detail: init objective="Process new GitHub activity on lidge-jun/opencodex with sol subagents: merge PR #124 and sync dev; post sol review comments on #124 and #123 (keep #123 draft); add dependabot ignore rules on dev for typescript major (root+gui) and @types/node major (gui) and close #108/#109/#110 with comments; implement actions bumps (setup-node v6.4.0, deploy-pages v5.0.0, withastro/action v6.1.2) on dev with matching tests/ci-workflows.test.ts SHA updates and close #105/#106/#107 as superseded.
